meta.title: Oder Agency | AI-Powered Growth Partner
meta.description: We build AI systems that run your business operations — so you can focus on growth. WhatsApp agents, voice receptionists, and automation that works 24/7.
meta.keywords: AI automation, growth partner, WhatsApp AI agent, voice receptionist, business automation, AI solutions

hero.headline: We build AI systems that run your business operations
hero.headlineAccent: — so you can focus on growth.
hero.subhead: From WhatsApp sales agents to voice receptionists, we deploy AI employees that work 24/7, cost 90% less, and never call in sick.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
problem.subtitle: Most businesses we work with face these exact challenges before they find us.

items.title: Missed leads after hours
items.desc: Customers reach out at night or weekends — no one answers. You lose them to competitors who respond faster.

items.title: Repetitive tasks eating your day
items.desc: Your team spends hours on follow-ups, scheduling, and data entry instead of high-value work.

items.title: Scaling means hiring headcount
items.desc: Every growth step requires more people, more overhead, more management — margins shrink.

items.title: Agencies that deliver reports, not results
items.desc: You've paid for marketing retainers that produce dashboards but no measurable revenue impact.

solution.title: We deploy AI employees for your business
solution.subtitle: Not dashboards. Not reports. Actual systems that do the work — 24/7, in your language, at a fraction of the cost.

cols.title: Automate
cols.desc: Replace repetitive manual work with AI agents that handle sales, support, and operations autonomously.

cols.title: Scale
cols.desc: Grow your capacity without growing your headcount. AI employees don't need training, breaks, or benefits.

cols.title: Measure
cols.desc: Every AI system comes with real-time dashboards showing appointments booked, leads captured, and revenue generated.

solutions.title: Our Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Purpose-built AI systems for the operations that matter most.

items.title: WhatsApp AI Sales Agent
items.desc: 24/7 AI agent that handles inbound sales, qualifies leads, and books appointments on WhatsApp — your customers' preferred channel.

items.title: Voice AI Receptionist
items.desc: Never miss a call again. AI receptionist answers, qualifies, and routes calls in multiple languages — day or night.

items.title: Review & Reputation Management
items.desc: Automated review collection, AI-crafted responses, and reputation monitoring across Google, Trustpilot, and marketplace platforms.

items.title: Customer Reactivation
items.desc: Turn your dormant customer list into booked appointments. Pay-per-result model — you only pay for meetings that happen.

items.title: Invoice & AP Automation
items.desc: OCR + AI extraction for invoices, automatic classification, GL-coding, and push to your ERP or accountant.

items.title: Custom AI Workflows
items.desc: Bespoke automation pipelines built on n8n — connecting your existing tools into intelligent, self-running workflows.

process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: Three steps from first call to live AI system.

steps.title: Audit
steps.desc: We map your operations, identify the highest-impact automation opportunities, and build a clear implementation plan.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: We deploy your AI systems, integrate with your existing tools, and train the models on your business context.

steps.title: Scale
steps.desc: We monitor performance, optimize continuously, and expand to new workflows as your business grows.

whyUs.title: Why Oder?
whyUs.subtitle: We're not another agency. We're operators who build and run AI systems.

items.title: No account managers
items.desc: You work directly with the founder. No junior handoffs, no communication layers.

items.title: Outcome-based
items.desc: We measure success in appointments booked, revenue generated, and hours saved — not impressions.

items.title: Month-to-month
items.desc: No long-term contracts. No lock-in. If we don't deliver, you walk. Simple.

items.title: Builder-first
items.desc: We don't just consult — we build, deploy, and maintain the actual systems. In-house. No outsourcing.

good.title: Great fit if you...
items: Run a service business with 5-200 employees
Lose leads because your team can't respond fast enough
Want to scale without proportionally growing headcount
Value measurable outcomes over marketing fluff
Are ready to invest in systems, not one-off projects

bad.title: Not the right fit if you...
items: Want the cheapest possible option regardless of quality
Need a full marketing agency (ads, social, content)
Aren't willing to share operational data for AI training
Expect overnight magic — real systems take 2-4 weeks to deploy

items.q: How long does it take to deploy an AI system?
items.a: Most systems go live within 2-4 weeks. Simple WhatsApp agents can be live in 5-7 days. Complex multi-system deployments take 4-6 weeks.

items.q: What happens if the AI makes a mistake?
items.a: Every system has human escalation built in. When the AI is uncertain, it routes to your team. We also monitor conversations and continuously improve accuracy.
No. We handle all technical setup, integration, and maintenance. You get a simple dashboard to monitor performance and results.

items.q: What languages does the AI support?
items.a: Our systems support Turkish, English, Arabic, Russian, and German out of the box. Additional languages can be added on request.
Yes. All our engagements are month-to-month. No long-term contracts, no cancellation fees. If we're not delivering value, you shouldn't be paying.
Each solution is priced based on scope and complexity. We offer setup fees plus monthly retainers, and for some services, pay-per-result models. Book a call for a custom quote.
AI employees handle repetitive, high-volume tasks — freeing your human team to focus on relationship building, complex decisions, and strategic work. It's augmentation, not replacement.

cta.title: Ready to automate your growth?
cta.subtitle: Book a free 20-minute strategy call. No commitment. Walk away with a clear automation plan for your business.
cta.note: Free consultation. No spam. Reply within 24h.

apply.title: Get a Custom Quote
apply.subtitle: Tell us about your business and what you're looking to automate. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with a tailored proposal.

fields.name: Your name
fields.solution: What would you like to automate?
fields.timeline: When would you like to start?

success.title: Application received!
success.message: We'll review your details and get back to you within 24 hours. Check your inbox.

about.headline: Built by operators, for operators.
about.story: Oder Agency was founded by Oltan Seven — a developer and automation specialist based in Antalya, Turkey. After years of building web applications and AI tools, one pattern became clear: businesses don't need more software — they need systems that actually do the work.
about.story2: That's why we focus exclusively on deploying AI employees — systems that handle sales, support, and operations autonomously. No dashboards that gather dust. No reports that nobody reads. Just working systems that deliver measurable results.

items.title: Direct access
items.desc: You talk to the person building your system. No layers, no delays.

items.title: Outcomes first
items.desc: We don't bill for effort. We optimize for your results.

items.title: Radical transparency
items.desc: You see everything — costs, performance, what's working and what's not.

items.title: Continuous improvement
items.desc: AI systems get better over time. We monitor, tune, and expand.

tech.title: Our Stack
items: Next.js
n8n
WhatsApp Business API
OpenAI GPT-4
Claude AI
Retell Voice AI
Supabase
Vercel

approach.headline: Audit. Build. Scale.
approach.subtitle: We don't start with a proposal. We start by understanding your operations — then we build systems that compound over time.

steps.title: Operations Audit
steps.desc: We spend 3-5 days mapping your current workflows, identifying bottlenecks, and ranking automation opportunities by ROI. You get a clear implementation roadmap — even if you don't work with us.

steps.title: System Build
steps.desc: We deploy your highest-impact AI systems first. Each system is integrated with your existing tools, trained on your business context, and tested before going live.

steps.title: Scale & Optimize
steps.desc: Once your first system is live and delivering results, we expand. New workflows, new channels, continuous optimization — your AI infrastructure grows with your business.

antiAgency.title: What makes us different
items: We don't sell retainers — we sell outcomes. If the system doesn't work, you don't pay.
No agency overhead. No account managers. You work directly with the people building your systems.
We eat our own cooking. Every tool we recommend, we use ourselves.
